quality.formatting_notes: The description clearly outlines activation, limitations (extradimensional movement vs. portals), size compatibility, removal process, and the escape mechanism.

mechanics.exceptions: Does not prevent passing through interdimensional portals.
mechanics.removal: Action by attuned user or designated creature.

escape_check.result: Destroys shackles and frees the creature

mechanics.balance_assessment: The DC 30 escape check is very high, balancing the powerful effect of completely locking down planar/teleportation abilities. The 30-day cooldown prevents spamming escape attempts.
